name: Peanut Butter & Fudge Bars
recipeInstructions:
Combine peanut butter morsels, corn syrup, and 2 tablespoons butter in a double boiler. Bring water to a boil and cook over hot water until the morsels melt. Stir well. Add cereal and stir thoroughly.
Press half of this mixture into a buttered baking dish (12 x 8 x 2 inches). Chill while preparing the chocolate layer. Set the remaining cereal mixture aside.
For the chocolate layer, combine chocolate morsels and 1/4 cup butter in another double boiler. Bring water to a boil and cook over hot water until the chocolate melts. Stir well. Add powdered sugar, milk, and vanilla extract, stirring until fully blended.
Spread this chocolate mixture over the chilled cereal layer. Spread the remaining cereal mixture over the chocolate layer and press firmly.
Chill until set. Cut into bars. Yield: 2 dozen.
